headline: Exploring Analyst Estimates for Hasbro (HAS) Q2 Earnings, Beyond Revenue and EPS
summary: Looking beyond Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Hasbro (HAS), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended June 2026.

headline: Hasbro to Produce New Toys Based on Nintendo’s The Legend of Zelda Franchise
summary: PAWTUCKET, R.I., July 16, 2026--Hasbro, a leading games, IP and toy company, today announced a new licensing partnership with Nintendo to create products based on the popular Legend of Zelda franchise. This multi-year collaboration is set to begin in 2027, starting with the first reveals of three 6" scale figures at San Diego Comic Con (July 23-26, 2026).
